heading: Permanent International Association of Road Congresses; authorization of membership
label: 269 Permanent International Association of Road Congresses; authorization of membership
text: The President is authorized to maintain membership of the United States in the Permanent International Association of Road Congresses.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 269, , , authorized appropriations of $3,000 per annum to enable United States to accept membership in Permanent Association of International Road Congresses, prior to repeal by , , .act June 18, 1926, ch. 62344 Stat. 754Pub. L. 102–138, title I, § 164(a)105 Stat. 676Oct. 28, 1991
